name: productivity
description: Portable, general-purpose productivity skills for any workflow: open a fresh chat in a new tab (breakout), open a seeded Warp tab running any command (new-warp-chat, the shared launcher breakout builds on), hand the conversation off to a new agent (handoff), and get a plan stress-tested through relentless interview (grill-me).

interface.shortDescription: Portable helpers: fresh-chat breakout, seeded Warp tabs, handoff, plan grilling.
interface.longDescription: Portable, general-purpose productivity skills for any workflow: breakout opens a fresh chat in a new tab, new-warp-chat is the shared launcher that opens a seeded, self-deleting Warp tab running any command, handoff compacts the conversation into a document a new agent can pick up, and grill-me stress-tests a plan or design through relentless interview until the decisions are settled.
